title: Introducing Enriched Experiment Results in LaunchDarkly | LaunchDarkly
description: Explore how LaunchDarkly’s enriched experiment results deliver deeper insights with enhanced visibility into conversions, exposures, and statistical analysis to make faster, data-driven decisions. Additionally, leverage expected loss to estimate and minimize the risk associated with each variant in your experiment.
